How it works

Beautiful homes, built phase by phase — with you.

Pick a service to see exactly how your project moves from first sketch to final delivery.

Your plan in three phases. Click through the phases — from validating your plot to a construction-ready architectural drawing.

Phase 01 · Site Layout
⊕ Tap drawing to enlarge
Phase 01

Site Analysis & Layout Confirmation

Every project begins with validating the site dimensions, road access, setbacks, orientation and main entrance direction. A layout confirmation PDF is shared for client approval — so the design process starts with complete accuracy.

You confirm

  • Site Dimensions
  • Road Access
  • Setbacks
  • Orientation
  • Main Entrance Direction
Phase 02

Concept Layout Development

Two concept layout options are developed based on your requirements, allowing you to compare and select the most suitable planning solution. Up to two concept iterations are provided for review and refinement before finalization.

Includes

  • Room Planning
  • Room Dimensions
  • Functional Space Allocation

Furniture layout and detailed door/window information are excluded at this stage.

Phase 03

Final Architectural Plan

The approved layout is converted into a precise, construction-ready drawing. This marks the completion of the 2D Planning service.

Includes

  • Furniture Layout
  • Door & Window Details
  • Dimensions
  • Rough Column Positions

Final deliverables are provided in PDF format. CAD files can be provided at an additional cost.

Site → Concept → Final Plan
Optional Add-On

3D Floor Plan Visualization

See your floor plan in three dimensions — space, furniture placement and room proportions — before construction begins. An ideal value-for-money option if you want a realistic view of your home without opting for a complete interior design package.

  • 3D Floor Plan Visualization
  • Furniture Layout
  • Multiple Colour Theme Options
  • Easy Space Visualization

One house, three stages. Click through the stages — and watch your elevation evolve from a white base model into the home you'll actually see from the street.

Stage 01 · Base Model
⊕ Tap drawing to enlarge
Phase 01

Base Confirmation & Reference Collection

The building base is created from the approved floor plan, and design references, styles and client preferences are confirmed before proceeding — so the concept is built around your taste from day one.

You confirm

  • Building Base Model
  • Style References
  • Client Preferences
Phase 02

Concept Development & 3D Modeling

The elevation concept is developed and converted into a detailed 3D model for client review. The model remains fully customizable, allowing design refinements and client feedback before rendering.

Includes

  • Elevation Concept
  • Detailed 3D Model
  • Design Refinements

Materials, colours, textures, lighting and rendering are excluded at this stage.

Phase 03

Photorealistic Visualization & Delivery

The approved model is rendered into a realistic exterior visualization. This marks the completion of the Exterior Elevation Design service.

Deliverables

  • 3D Exterior Elevation
  • Dimensions
  • Material Specification Sheet
  • Colour Combinations
  • Lighting Details
  • Video Walkthrough
Sketch → Model → Reality

Your interiors in three phases. Click through the phases — from concept to a photorealistic, room-by-room preview of your finished home.

Phase 01 · Concept & Planning
⊕ Tap image to enlarge
Phase 01

Concept & Space Planning

The interior concept is developed based on your lifestyle, functional requirements and design preferences — down to detailed concept drawings for custom features.

Built around

  • Your Lifestyle
  • Functional Requirements
  • Design Preferences
  • Space Planning
Phase 02

3D Modeling & Design Development

A detailed 3D model is created and refined with your feedback before finalization. The design remains fully customizable during this stage — change anything until it feels like yours.

Includes

  • Detailed 3D Model
  • Your Feedback
  • Fully Customizable
Phase 03

Photorealistic Visualization & Delivery

The approved design is completed with realistic materials, lighting and finishes. The walkthrough gives a complete room-to-room experience — every space visualized with no blind spots before execution.

Deliverables

  • 3D Interior Visualization
  • Interior Design Concept
  • Material Palette
  • Lighting Layout & Fixture Placement
  • Walkthrough Video

Dimension details available as an add-on.

Concept → Model → Reality
Proof, not promises

We don't just render dreams. They get built.

Compare our 3D designs with the finished site work — an executive office cabin and a custom tree-column feature, both executed exactly as visualized. That's what a no-blind-spots walkthrough does for your project.

Why Shelter Sketches

Designed by engineers. Detailed for builders.

Approval at every phaseNothing moves forward until you confirm it — no surprises at delivery.
Construction-ready outputPrecise dimensions, column positions and door/window details, ready for site.
Video walkthroughsExperience your design the way you'll live in it — not just a flat drawing.
Clear deliverablesEvery service lists exactly what you receive, in PDF — CAD available on request.

About us

Converting dreams into working plans.

Hello, everyone. Welcome to Shelter Sketches — a group of engineers based in Pondicherry, India. We provide the best and most unique visualization for your dream house, with accurate detail in every drawing. It's what keeps us energised: more ideas, more possibilities, for your dream home.

Suganesh, B.E. Civil Founder · Shelter Sketches
